text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That wasn't the first time.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
That 2,400-meter turf race the three of<n>us ran right
after we entered the<n>academy—the race that
brought us<n>together...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: That wasn't the first time we raced.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
You probably don't remember, but I<n>once raced
against you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide.

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
The winner of the Kiddy Race is Biwa<n>Hayahide!
Coming in second is Narita<n>Brian! Congrats to
these two amazing<n>sisters!
Clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Young Brian
text_block_list.text: Dang it! You really are fast, Big Sis!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hehe! I can't be losing to my little<n>sister just yet!

text_block_list.name: Young Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's go home and talk<n>about our race!
We have to get better<n>if we wanna race in the
Twinkle<n>Series together!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Those two sisters were incredible! I<n>don't think
I've seen Umamusume<n>run that fast before,
especially not at<n>the Kiddy Race!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
If they keep it up and continue their<n>training, I bet
we'll see great things<n>from them in the future.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait to see them race in the<n>Twinkle Series
one day!

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Taishin? Did you get<n>hurt?

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: No. I'm fine.

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: That's good... Listen, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Young Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?

text_block_list.name: Taishin's Mother
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry you're so small... It's all<n>my fault...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Argh. Dammit!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
The Kikuka Sho's coming up. I need<n>to get some
solo training in...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough, cough! Hack!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Ugh, what's all that racket...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Haaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Yeesh! How's she still speeding up?!<n>Her time for
the last three furlongs is<n>off the charts!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text:
Hayahide's been in another league<n>ever since the
end of summer camp. I<n>wonder what's gonna
happen at the<n>Kikuka Sho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Nnngh!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Oh, Taishin! Taaaiiishiiin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I hear you, Ticket.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Hey, hey, hey! Did you see<n>Hayahide's run?!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: She was unreeeaaal!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I'm not gonna lose to her after seeing<n>that!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Taishin? What's up?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: You're looking kinda under the wea—

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Wait, Taishin!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(Run! Run, run, run! I've gotta keep<n>running! I'm
nowhere near ready!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(After watching Hayahide, I couldn't<n>even imagine
myself winning. But<n>Ticket wasn't fazed at all!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (At this rate, I'm gonna get left<n>behind!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff... Wheeze!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Cough... wheeze... Splutter!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: Huh? Hey, are you okay?! You're all<n>pale!

text_block_list.name: Passerby C
text_block_list.text: S-somebody call an ambulance!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (I'm gonna be the only one... left<n>behind...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(No one will accept me... I'll be back<n>to getting
teased like before...)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huh, where am I?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I was running just now... How'd I<n>end up here?

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
choice_data_list: It doesn't matter. Just rest for now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: You're kidding me, right?! The KikukaSho's around the corner, and youwant me to rest?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Ugh...

Narita Taishin must be in really bad<n>shape
because instead of fighting<n>back like usual, she
simply drops her<n>shoulders in defeat.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
Coming in. Ah, good to see that<n>you're awake
now.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Um, hello.

The doctor asks Narita Taishin and<n>me a few
questions while conducting<n>a thorough
examination on her.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
To be completely honest, I can't give<n>you the
all-clear to race in the Kikuka<n>Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: What?! Wh-why?! I'm not even<n>injured!

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's true. You don't have any<n>external injuries,
but our tests show<n>indications of minor
inflammation in<n>your respiratory system.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I assume you've been feeling very<n>fatigued
lately? I think it will be<n>difficult for you to fully
recover in time<n>for the race.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
I would go as far to say that you<n>won't be able to
run well if you<n>participate.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: No...

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text:
That's my professional opinion as a<n>doctor, but
I'll leave it up to you to<n>make the final decision
after you talk<n>with your trainer.

text_block_list.name: Doctor
text_block_list.text: Now then, if you'll excuse me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: ...I'm doing it.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'm gonna race in the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please... Please don't tell me not to<n>race.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Racing is all I have. Racing and<n>winning are
everything to me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Please, Trainer! If I can't run, then...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I'll be nothing!

Narita Taishin begs me with tears<n>streaming down
her face.
And I don't have the heart to refuse<n>her.
